input.tenant_message: The window in my living room won't close all the way — there's about a half-inch gap at the bottom that I can't get to seal no matter what I try. Cold air is coming in and my heating bill is going to be crazy this month. I think the latch mechanism is broken.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a maintenance visit within 3-5 days to inspect the window latch and frame for damage or misalignment. Replace the latch hardware or re-seat the window sash as needed to restore a proper seal.
